name: ceap
description: Enterprise AI agentic engineering workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise AI engineering workflows with auditability and policy control.
interface.longDescription: CEAP adds structured Codex workflows for AI impact simulation, regulated ticket-to-code evidence packs, policy-bound agents, repository context analysis, quality engineering, security governance, multi-agent planning, enterprise memory, release readiness, and regulated engineering environments.
defaultPrompt: Create a PR evidence pack for this ticket.
Run an AI impact twin analysis for this change.
Design policy-bound agents for this workflow.
